policy.deletion_rule: This inventory does not authorize deleting scripts or artifacts.
policy.high_risk_rule: Packet, refinement, and MT Markdown writes must be migrated to primary contract writers or carry an explicit contract-sync proof.
policy.purpose: Deterministically inventory governance artifact writers before migrating residual Markdown/projection writes.
